{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Housing affordability is the biggest public policy issue affecting California today.",
    "Not responding immediately to the housing crisis will create dire consequences for quality of life and the economy.",
    "California must use all possible resources to combat homelessness and housing shortages.",
    "California Housing Element law is being updated to better assess the number of individuals and families facing homelessness.",
    "Emergency housing will include homeless shelters and permanent supportive housing during declared shelter crises in Orange County.",
    "Streamlining California Environmental Quality Act processes is a key point in combating the homelessness crisis.",
    "Leasing airspace under state highways for emergency shelters has been effective in communities across California.",
    "The Sustainable Communities Strategy is expanding to track and report on real housing development."
  ]
}
